title: ArmorStand+
description: Lightweight client-side mod that prevents armor stands from being destroyed.
body:
# ArmorStand+

## Features
- Adds a simple protection feature for armor stands that prevents breaking if the player attacks too quickly in a short time.
- Supports configuration via mod menu & yacl.
- Configure attack speed cooldown.

When you attack armor stands too quickly, they can break and drop as items.
This feature prevents that issue, allowing you to safely sweep through armor stands.
I recommend `500ms` for attack speed cooldown value.

Perfect for **personal use** or **farm using armor stand sweeping**.

## Check
- [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/armorstand+/gallery)
- [Changelog](https://modrinth.com/mod/armorstand+/changelog)

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
